history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A young man is photographed indoors in front of a tiled wall, looking toward the camera while wearing a black graphic T-shirt.

Main Subject:
A young man with short, dark, slightly tousled hair stands facing the camera. He has a neutral expression with relaxed lips, and he wears a black T-shirt with a large grayscale graphic across the chest. He is framed from about the upper torso upward, with his head turned slightly to his right and his gaze directed toward the camera. In the background, a second view of the same person appears in a mirror, facing away.

Setting:
The scene is in an indoor hallway or restroom-like area with light-colored tiled walls and a light-colored ceiling. Overhead recessed lighting is visible, and a metal handrail runs horizontally along the left side. The floor and walls are smooth and reflective in places, with gray tones dominating the background.

Visual Details:
The wall is covered with rectangular light tiles arranged in a grid. The man’s black T-shirt contrasts with the pale tiled background; the graphic appears metallic or textured in light gray and white with darker sections. A vertical dark edge (possibly a frame or column) is visible near the center-left behind him, and the mirror reflection shows his back and the side of his head.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a young man standing indoors and looking at the camera while wearing a black graphic T-shirt. A mirror behind him reflects the same person from a different angle in a tiled corridor.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

No visible text detected in the screenshot.

# Structured Version

- **Text on image:** None found
- **UI/labels/error messages:** None present

# Notes

- The image appears to be a photo of a person wearing a black T-shirt with a graphic design, but the design text is not readable/legible enough to extract accurately. If you provide a higher-resolution or closer crop of the shirt graphic, I can try again.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, wavy hair styled with a slight puff and a subtle mustache is looking off to the right, captured in a medium shot. He's wearing a black crewneck sweatshirt with a distressed, gothic-style graphic on the front, featuring silver lettering that appears to read "GRAUL" above a faded, monochrome portrait. The background is a modern bathroom with light beige tiled walls and a large mirror that reflects the man from behind, showing his profile and the back of his sweatshirt. The lighting is bright and diffused, likely from overhead bathroom lights, creating soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the tiles and the man's hair. A chrome faucet is visible in the lower left corner, reflecting the light. The overall mood is casual and slightly introspective, with a focus on the subject and his attire. The color palette is dominated by the black of the sweatshirt, the neutral tones of the bathroom, and the silver of the graphic.
